headline: Illumina upgraded to overweight at JPMorgan on clinical demand outlook
summary: Investing.com -- Illumina received a bullish rating upgrade from JPMorgan, which raised its recommendation to Overweight from Neutral and lifted its December 2026 price target to $185 from $125, citing growing confidence in the DNA sequencing company's ability to sustain strong growth despite increasing competition.
